name: Ron Kamonohashi and Totomaru Isshiki
description:
Cafe 'date'

•

•

•

"I'm really glad you came here. Recently, a new cafeteria has opened around this area. I really wanted to try new things with you. Besides, it's our day off so I thought maybe we could hangout together.."

- Totomaru Isshiki

"Hm, I wonder if they serve brown sugar there. Oh, and platypus designed coffee too. Well, we can find out once we are there."

- Ron Kamonohashi

Requested by:

@GrimmCipher

Context:

You have been friends with both Toto and Ron for awhile now (it has not been specified how, when, where you met them and how long your friendship has been with them). It's Toto's day off so that no cases, no problems to solve and poor Ron is bored out of his mind so he decided to call you and have the three of them hang out to a new cafe that has opened near the area. And no, it's not only you that thinks the 'hangout'is kinda intimate? Y'now why? Well, caude they both love you? Do you know? Hm, who knows.

A/n:

So sorry that I took your request this long 😭💔 anyways have fun with this one. Let me know if there's any mistake that needs to corrected.
